description: LangGraph state schema for Supply Chain Copilot — defines all state fields passed between nodes

demand_signals.description: Weekly demand data per SKU-store with actual vs forecast, anomaly flags, and drivers

inventory_positions.description: Current stock-on-hand, in-transit, on-order, weeks-of-cover per SKU-store

active_promotions.description: Active and upcoming promotions with expected uplift and SKU-region scope

supplier_status.description: Open supplier delays with severity, affected SKUs, revised ETAs, mitigation options

weather_events.description: Active and upcoming weather/event signals with historical demand impact by SKU

root_cause_hypotheses.description: Ranked hypotheses for each exception with evidence citations and confidence scores

recommendations.description: Ranked action recommendations with cost, impact, constraints, HITL flag

critique_results.description: Evidence check, constraint violation flags, confidence by recommendation

approval_status.description: HITL approval: pending/approved/rejected/edited; approver ID; timestamp; edit notes

what_if_results.description: Simulation outputs for recommended actions (e.g. transfer X units → service level impact)

trace_metadata.description: Tool calls made, latency, tokens, cost, node path taken, failed calls

output_routes.HIGH: diagnose_node → recommend_node → critique_node → escalate_node (HITL if cost > INR 100K)
output_routes.MEDIUM: diagnose_node → recommend_node → critique_node → auto_approve if cost < INR 25K
output_routes.DATA_ANOMALY: flag_node (return to monitoring; do not trigger action)

output_routes.FAIL_NO_EVIDENCE: return to diagnose_node for additional evidence retrieval
output_routes.FAIL_CONSTRAINT_VIOLATION: return to recommend_node for alternative recommendation
